scripts.dev: concurrently --raw -n "MQTT,GPS,SER,WEB" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan" "cd services && npm run mqtt" "cd services && npm run gps" "cd services && npm run serial" "cd webapp && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:noserial: concurrently --raw -n "MQTT,GPS,WEB" -c "blue,green,cyan" "cd services && npm run mqtt" "cd services && npm run gps" "cd webapp && npm run dev"
scripts.install-all: cd services && npm install && cd ../webapp && npm install
